ideation: This animation sequence depicts a child excitedly sliding down a playground slide. The sequence starts with the arms raised in anticipation and ends with them extended downward to suggest the motion of sliding. For the first frame, both arms are raised with a slight bend at the 'shoulder', palms facing forward. In the second frame, the arms begin to move downward, mirroring the motion of sliding. By the third frame, the arms are halfway down, maintaining the forward-facing palms. The fourth frame shows the arms nearing the bottom of the imaginary slide, and in the final frame, both arms are extended downward, palms still facing forward, as if the child has reached the end of the slide.

frames.beat: arms raised high in excited anticipation
arms begin the thrilling descent down the slide
mid-slide, the motion continues smoothly downward
nearing the end, arms stretch further down
arms extend to the bottom, slide completed
